title: lsc's Player Dolls
body:
# Introduction

A simple resource pack that transforms vanilla Player Heads into adorable dolls.

一个简单的材质包，将原版的 “玩家头颅” 替换为了可爱的玩偶模型。

# Requirements

You **MUST** install one of the following to make the models work:

为了让模型正常显示，你**必须**安装以下其中一种模组：

- **OptiFine**
- **ETF + EMF** (Recommended / 推荐)

# Gallery

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23a59ab4af7b879f463af2bd643e08639957f096.jpeg)

# Notes

1. Visual glitches may occur when worn on the head.
   
   将玩偶戴在头上时可能会出现显示问题。
   
2. Hitbox and sounds remain the same as vanilla Player Heads.
   
   玩偶的碰撞箱和放置/破坏音效仍与原版头颅保持一致。
   
3. If using "Skin Layers 3D", please disable "3D Skulls" and "3D Skulls Item" settings, otherwise rendering issues will occur.
   
   如果安装了 “3D 皮肤层” 模组，请关闭 “3D头颅” 和 “3D头颅物品” 选项，否则会出现渲染问题。
